'''Doneer'so''' was the primary [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Doneer'so system/Legends|Doneer'so system]] in the [[Fakir sector/Legends|Fakir sector]] of the [[Bakchou arm]]. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoid]] [[Doneer]] race. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Doneer'so served as the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], who established their headquarters in the [[Sotak'vik]] clan-city. The Empire maintained a [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] and [[nuclear]]-damping system over their sector capital, and the use of Sotak'vik engendered fanatic loyalty to the Empire in the [[Sotak city-clan]]. Other cities, such as [[Tokks'vik]] which was the planet's main [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]], support the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].
